title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Route Link Grouping
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench first-screen navigation friction by grouping the existing /pm-review/import-intake route links while preserving every existing href, route target, quick-jump link, export behavior, status behavior, storage boundary, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Add local route-link group metadata for Shell, Intake Reads, and PM Workfront.
Render the existing PM intake route links under those group headings while preserving the same five hrefs.
Add focused smoke coverage proving group headings, group link counts, one link per href, and unchanged route targets.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar recommended PM Lane 080 as local PM intake route-link grouping after PM Lane 079. The recommendation was accepted as a separate browser-local navigation cleanup. A separate read-only sidecar then recommended PM Lane 081 as local PM intake helper panel stack grouping, with no edits, tests, artifacts, staging, commits, or service access.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page route-link markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for the grouped route links.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
